name.comment: Short name or acronym of the tool.

description.comment: Free-text description of what the tool does.

type.comment: Tool category or role (e.g. Taxonomic Profiler).

latest_release.comment: Latest release of the tool/database as of today.

curated_release.comment: Release version recorded at the time of last curation of this entry.

citation_count.comment: Number of citations for the tool (from Google Scholar).

number_github_issues.comment: Number of issues on GitHub repository (if applicable).

host_reads_removal.comment: Indicates whether the tool can remove host reads (e.g. human) as part of its workflow.

memory.comment: Memory requirement for running the tool (in GB).

quality_control.comment: Indicates whether the tool performs quality control on input reads.

functional_profiling.comment: Indicates whether the tool can perform functional profiling in addition to taxonomic profiling.

strain_level.comment: Indicates the level of strain resolution the tool can achieve.

approach_detail.comment: Free-text description of the underlying approach or algorithm used by the tool.

supports_longreads.comment: Indicates support for long-read sequencing data.

supports_shortreads.comment: Indicates support for short-read sequencing data.

taxonomy.comment: Taxonomy used by the tool (NCBI or GTDB)

uses_databases.label: has input
uses_databases.comment: List of database identifiers that the tool can use. Each item: object with name, @id and optional release.
